title: Sautela Bhai
desc: A teacher betroths his stepbrother to the daughter of a rich man but discovers that he is already married. However, things take a turn when the girl's father finds out.

title: Billu Ustaad
desc: Orphaned at a young age, Billu finds solace in his close-knit group of friends. However, when ruthless terrorists abduct them, he seeks help from two elite officers to save them.

title: Param Dharam
desc: Savitri believes that her illegitimate child with her deceased lover, Vijay, was stillborn and did not survive. Years later, Savitri's world changes when she learns that her firstborn is alive.

title: Badrinath Yatra
desc: After Devdutt gets arrested, his mother, who is about to go on a pilgrimage, cancels her trip. Things take a turn for the worse when he starts visiting a brothel and ignores his pregnant wife.

title: Rifle Ganj
desc: When a brilliant and knowledgeable engineer's family suffers due to a corrupt government, he turns into a notorious Naxal commander to seek revenge.

title: Tulsi
desc: Tulsi wants to marry Ganesh, but her father does not agree. Meanwhile, when the village matchmakers arrange for her marriage with Thakur Singh, she strives to marry the person of her choice.
